description: Largest potential establishment area with 250 m to settlement or fastboende proxies, 75 m to large roads, 25 m to medium roads, and the widest electrical connection distance.
blocking_logic: Settlement <= 250 m around settlement, housing and fastboende proxies; large roads <= 75 m; medium roads <= 25 m; 3 km coastal zone not active; aviation bird <= 0 m only where the scenario activates it; electrical must be <= 7000 m; cultural environment, protected nature, military, aviation approach and strand remain overlap-based hard exclusions.
scoring_logic: Acceptance score = 35% electrical proximity + 45% clearance + 20% landscape context; score is zeroed when any blocking rule is triggered.

description: Middle scenario used as the new stage-1 default for acceptance v4, with the 3 km coastal zone as a hard stop but without the bird-collision rule.
blocking_logic: Settlement <= 300 m around settlement, housing and fastboende proxies; large roads <= 100 m; medium roads <= 50 m; 3 km coastal zone overlap active; aviation bird <= 0 m only where the scenario activates it; electrical must be <= 5000 m; cultural environment, protected nature, military, aviation approach and strand remain overlap-based hard exclusions.
scoring_logic: Acceptance score = 35% electrical proximity + 45% clearance + 20% landscape context; score is zeroed when any blocking rule is triggered.

description: Smallest potential establishment area with 600 m to settlement or fastboende proxies, 175 m to large roads, 100 m to medium roads, the 3 km coastal zone, bird-collision clearance, and a tighter electrical-feasibility limit.
blocking_logic: Settlement <= 600 m around settlement, housing and fastboende proxies; large roads <= 175 m; medium roads <= 100 m; 3 km coastal zone overlap active; aviation bird <= 2000 m only where the scenario activates it; electrical must be <= 3000 m; cultural environment, protected nature, military, aviation approach and strand remain overlap-based hard exclusions.
scoring_logic: Acceptance score = 35% electrical proximity + 45% clearance + 20% landscape context; score is zeroed when any blocking rule is triggered.
